reviews.review_title: So there is a bug with the name system🦐
reviews.review_description: So some of yall know if yall do load into the Game some of yall might get this screen saying, "playfab login success! Updating Username.." And if it does get stuck on this screen you might just think the Game just does not like you but it's just a bug with your Username, see if you Username has these things called underscores/_ then the Game gets stuck cause the Game is racist to underscores so the counter this you have to get rid of the underscores in your Username NOT DISPLAY THE BOTTOM ONE THAT SAYS USERNAME And Get Rid Of The Underscores Then They Will Let You Pass the Border Then Yall Can Play At Long Last🔥

reviews.review_title: This game has to be a top 5 gtag horror
reviews.review_description: I first just downloaded it, it looked interesting I played it, very scary I got some cosmetics and now I'm thinking about buying the mod menu because this game is actually fun to play and I could do way more fun stuff with the mod menu. I really recommend this game. 10/10

reviews.review_title: It's ok, but not as good as breakoutvr
reviews.review_description: I tried the game, and sure it was like any other, run from the retextured monkey model that was labeled as the monster, it got boring, nothing new, no monster gimmicks, just...run from monkeys, each day I try to find something like breakoutvr and I still can't find anything near that level of entertaining and fun to play, someday I hope there's a new version, or some kind of remake of breakoutvr so I can relive the countless summer days I spent playing the game

The gameplay is good but very buggy, when I try to join my friends or just play with one friend we end up don’t joining each other either we are in the same code but not together (somehow) or it just not connecting me to the game. Please fix this for us

I love this game, and it has multiple levels (Warehouse, Vents, Caves, Hell, and The BACKROOMS). The Warehouse is terrifying because if you’re going down a long hallway and a monster is chasing you, you better run for your life! Also, in warehouse, you can climb onto shelves and get higher ground so the monsters can’t chase you. The Backrooms is SO SCARY in this game, it’ll have you hesitating to leave the safe zone!!! Caves￼ is a little claustrophobic, and if the monster chases you, it’s kind of difficult to run, but you better keep your flashlight on or you won’t be able to see a thing. In Hell, there is really no where to go. VENTS on the other hand is TERRIFYING WHEN THE MONSTER CHASES YOU! Oh and you’re really fast in Hell, but so is the monster… So that’s it! I really recommend downloading Stupid Chimp Slop.

the graphics are good but the people in the game are terrible you should add an option where you can turn off troll items because i have to restart my game every single time and i'm new to the game so this is giving me a bad first impression and friendly mode still let's the monsters kill me so i can't explore freely.

reviews.review_title: Don’t listen to haters best horror game!
reviews.review_description: This game is super fun with friends because you run from monsters and it’s very scary especially on Extreme mode this game is very well made just please fix codes/rooms because when I try to play with my friends we have to restart are games like 3 times but still really fun keep working on Chemp physics and this because this and Chemp physics is just CINEMA! Also the people that say I can’t join or it has a glitch for them it makes no sense because I had no problem and if you can’t join the game restart your headset or game it fixes the problem. But yeah go out there and be a chimp!

If you’re looking for a game that doesn’t take itself too seriously and delivers nonstop laughs, this is it. From the moment I started playing, I was hooked. The gameplay is fun, chaotic, and surprisingly addictive, with just the right mix of challenge and ridiculousness.

The VR experience feels immersive and responsive, and there are plenty of moments that had me genuinely laughing out loud. Whether you’re playing for a few minutes or losing track of time, it’s one of those games that’s easy to pick up and hard to put down.

The developers clearly put a lot of creativity and personality into the game, and it shows. If you enjoy fun, lighthearted VR games that are all about having a good time, this one is definitely worth checking out.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5/5 - One of the most entertaining and memorable VR experiences I’ve played in a long time!
I had so much fun playing this game. The mechanics they made like you could break the glass was awesome and all the levels just looked so good. Keep making updates for this game

reviews.review_title: FIX THIS PLEASE ITS SO ANNOYING
reviews.review_description: So i LOVE this game. Sooo much. But there are two MAIN problems. The purple bananas, others bug you with them and its annoying so my idea is only allow the person holding it to use it. Problem solved. And the other one is the Slug in The Backrooms, it spawn camps so often and i love the scare when it comes in the entrance so do something so it dowsnt spawn camp.
The game is fun and great,but in the backrooms the monster comes in the safe zone
i love this game but this some reasons that the monsters be glitched but i still love this game though while you're doing a great job make one game that'll be so cool for everybody like a mashup.

Every single time I join the game, it’s unplayable since I’m stuck on this stupid loading screen saying “Updating display name.” And it never loads me in, ever, even when I rejoin and uninstall and reinstall the game, I thought something could work but it doesn’t. Seeing other reviews it seems this game needs working on. I wish someone could listen to us and fix all of those problems but I suppose not. Honestly, XORWIRE should’ve stayed on their other projects. 




Those who came to this review, and also is having problems, play Blud Slop instead. It’s like this game.
